items.claim: Dricus du Plessis has a higher finishing upside than Kamaru Usman.
items.quote: I think DDP has the far higher finishing upside, too.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman's only path to victory is by racking up control time and landing takedowns.
items.quote: If Usman wins, it's likely going to end up looking like the damn Buckley fight where he's just racking up control time, landing takedowns, putting on the Crafty Vet Baster class. But that's the only way I see him winning this fight.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has notoriously horrible takedown defense.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez, who has had notoriously horrible takedown defense

items.claim: Chase Hooper is a grappler who will attempt to take Mitch Ramirez down.
items.quote: from whatever we've seen, all of Jay Sup's last tape, we know the man is a grappler. He's going to be shooting takedowns.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has enough power to knock out Chase Hooper.
items.quote: He has enough power to knock him out.
